description: Use Apache Gravitino as Iceberg Rest Catalog.
on_init: CREATE SECRET gravitino_storage (TYPE S3, KEY_ID 'admin', SECRET 'password', ENDPOINT '127.0.0.1:9000', URL_STYLE 'path', USE_SSL 0); ATTACH '' AS my_datalake (TYPE ICEBERG, ENDPOINT 'http://127.0.0.1:9001/iceberg', AUTHORIZATION_TYPE 'none', ACCESS_DELEGATION_MODE 'vended_credentials'); CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS my_datalake.default;
